public static long[] solve(String[] words) {

    int n = words.length;

    if (n == 0) return new long[0];

    long[] prefix_max = new long[n];

    long[] suffix_max = new long[n];

    // Compute prefix_max

    prefix_max[0] = 0;

    for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) {

        prefix_max[i] = Math.max( prefix_max[i-1], lcp(words[i-1], words[i]) );

    }

    // Compute suffix_max

    suffix_max[n-1] = 0;

    for (int i = n-2; i >= 0; i--) {

        suffix_max[i] = Math.max( lcp(words[i], words[i+1]), suffix_max[i+1] );

    }

    long[] answer = new long[n];

    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        long left = (i == 0) ? 0 : prefix_max[i-1];

        long right = (i == n-1) ? 0 : suffix_max[i+1];

        long cross = 0;

        if (i > 0 && i < n-1) {

            cross = lcp(words[i-1], words[i+1]);

        }

        answer[i] = Math.max( Math.max(left, right), cross );

    }

    return answer;

}

vector<long long> solve(vector<string> words) {

    int n = words.size();

    if (n == 0) return {};

    if (n == 1) return {0};

    vector<int> prefixes(n-1, 0);

    for (int i = 0; i < n-1; ++i) {

        prefixes[i] = common_prefix(words[i], words[i+1]);

    }

    // compute max_prefix and max_suffix

    vector<int> max_prefix(n-1, 0);

    max_prefix[0] = prefixes[0];

    for (int i = 1; i < n-1; ++i) {

        max_prefix[i] = max(max_prefix[i-1], prefixes[i]);

    }

    vector<int> max_suffix(n-1, 0);

    max_suffix[n-2] = prefixes[n-2];

    for (int i = n-3; i >= 0; --i) {

        max_suffix[i] = max(max_suffix[i+1], prefixes[i]);

    }

    vector<long long> answer(n, 0);

    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {

        int original_max = 0;

        if (i == 0) {

            if (n-1 >= 2) {

                original_max = max_suffix[1];

            }

        } else if (i == n-1) {

            if (n-1 >= 2) {

                original_max = max_prefix[n-2 - 1]; // m-2 is (n-1) - 2 = n-3?

                // Wait, m = n-1, so m-2 = n-3.

                // So when i is n-1, original_max is max_prefix[m-2] = max_prefix[n-3].

                // But when n-1 >= 2, which is n >= 3.

                // So for example, when n=3, m=2, and i=2 (n-1), original_max is max_prefix[2-2] = max_prefix[0], which is correct.

                original_max = max_prefix[n-3];

            }

        } else {

            int left_max_val = 0;

            if (i-2 >= 0) {

                left_max_val = max_prefix[i-2];

            }

            int right_max_val = 0;

            if (i+1 < n-1) {

                right_max_val = max_suffix[i+1];

            }

            original_max = max(left_max_val, right_max_val);

        }

        int new_len = 0;

        if (i != 0 && i != n-1) {

        }

        answer[i] = max(original_max, new_len);
